surface_strategies.global_containers: The 'Grid Borders' look: Flat backgrounds, 1px sharp borders (border-white/10), no drop shadows. Strictly 2D and dense.
surface_strategies.cards_and_widgets: Flat solid background (#08080A) with 1px border. On hover, slight border color shift to primary/50. No elevation.
surface_strategies.agent_brain_logs: The 'Terminal' look: Deep black background, subtle phosphor green or cyan borders, monospace text exclusively, subtle CSS scanline overlay for the aesthetic.
surface_strategies.header_nav: Crystal Glass variant: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 with a sharp 1px bottom border (border-white/10).
surface_strategies.emergency_halt: Solid Signal Red background (#FF3B30) with pure white bold text. Must use 'Tracing Beam' or subtle pulsing ring to remain perpetually visible and distinct from all other data.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID. Strict grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 layout. Dense data packing.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) between widgets to maintain dashboard density. Use generous internal padding (p-4 to p-6) inside widgets to prevent claustrophobia.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align all data tables, agent logs, and textual readouts. Right-align monetary values and performance metrics in tables. Never center-align paragraphs.

components.strategy: Shadcn/UI extensively modified. Strip out all rounded-md and default shadow-sm. Use rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 2px) for a sharper, aggressive quant feel.
components.buttons: Rectangular, sharp edges (rounded-none). Primary buttons use primary color (#00E5FF) text on transparent bg with 1px primary border. Hover: invert to solid primary bg with black text.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Dense sizing. Border-collapse with border-b border-white/5 on rows. Hover state: bg-white/5.
components.charts: Shadcn Charts (Recharts). Use strictly primary, success, and danger colors. Minimal grid lines (stroke-white/5).
components.badges: Square (rounded-none). text-xs uppercase tracking-widest. Used for Regime Indicators (Bull, Bear, Fear).
components.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react). Use 'regular' or 'bold' weights. Essential for dense dashboards.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Instant or very fast transitions (duration-150 ease-in-out). Change border colors and text colors, avoid scaling transforms to maintain grid integrity.
motion_and_interactions.live_data: Flash background of updated cells briefly (green for up, red for down) then fade to transparent over 500ms.
motion_and_interactions.agent_pipeline: Use framer-motion for a glowing 'active' node that travels between agents. A subtle pulse (animate-pulse) on the currently running agent.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: None or simple fade. Speed and performance are critical for a quant terminal.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass APCA and WCAG AA guidelines against the #030305 background. Muted text should not drop below 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.focus: focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary on all inputs and buttons.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY. All buttons, nav links, table rows, and key metrics must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., 'nav-positions-link', 'emergency-halt-btn').

pages_and_features.main_dashboard: Overview of regime, equity curve (large Recharts area chart), and 4-column bento summary of active positions and system status.
pages_and_features.positions_page: Full-width dense data table for open positions (P&L, R-multiple, hold time). Use red/green color coding exclusively for P&L.
pages_and_features.agent_brain_page: Split view: Left side shows the pipeline visualization (who is talking), Right side shows the streaming debate log in terminal-style typography.
pages_and_features.performance_page: Heavy use of Recharts. Drawdown chart in red, Equity curve in blue/cyan. Stat grids for Win Rate, Profit Factor, Sharpe.
pages_and_features.universe_page: Ranked stock list. Use subtle bar visuals inside the table cells to represent Bayesian/Momentum scores visually.
pages_and_features.settings_page: Dense form layouts using Shadcn Forms. Sliders for risk parameters, inputs for LLM cost limits.

images.description: Subtle, dark, sleek trading terminal background with abstract grid and micro-charts. Use for login or empty states.
Abstract glowing nodes and connections on obsidian background. Ideal for the Agent Brain / Pipeline background overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. DO NOT invent new gray scales; rely on the base background and borders.
Use JetBrains Mono for all headings, numbers, and data tables.
Apply 'data-testid' to EVERY interactive element and key metric block.
Keep component borders to 1px with no border-radius (rounded-none) to achieve the technical Swiss/Quant look.
The Emergency Halt button MUST be perpetually visible on every screen, likely in the global top header, rendered in solid Signal Red (#FF3B30).
